data.title: US Mental Health Treatment Market by 2026: Outpatient & Inpatient Facilities, Apps & Therapists drive $2BN segment growth, up from $118BN with demand surge during pandemic.
data.description: A report titled "The U.S. Mental Health Treatment Market 2026: Outpatient & Inpatient Facilities, Apps & Therapists" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com offerings. The study conducted by Marketdata LLC focuses on the $118 billion mental health services market in the United States, which comprises outpatient and inpatient mental health and substance abuse centers, psychiatric hospitals, and mental health apps platforms. The demand for mental health services has significantly increased due to the pandemic.

data.title: NATHO study shows travel clinicians cost less than expected for healthcare organizations in filling staffing gaps.
data.description: A recent study conducted by the National Association of Travel Healthcare Organizations (NATHO) in New York on Jan. 13, 2026, has revealed that travel clinicians could be a more cost-effective solution for healthcare organizations facing staffing shortages than previously assumed. The study indicates that when factoring in all labor costs, hiring travel clinicians may come out to be less expensive. This new insight could be particularly beneficial for healthcare facilities trying to manage their budgets effectively.

data.title: Actiphy Inc. releases ActiveImage Protector update supporting Proxmox, enabling backup/recovery for the platform.
data.description: Actiphy Inc., located in Wildomar, California, has introduced an updated version of ActiveImage Protector. This new version includes backup and recovery capabilities specifically designed for the Proxmox open-source virtualization platform.

data.title: Dow Jones drops after surprise CPI inflation report; Nvidia stock falls. Live coverage by Investor's Business Daily.
data.description: On Tuesday, the Dow Jones index experienced a decline following the release of a surprising Consumer Price Index (CPI) inflation report. Nvidia's stock also faced a decrease during morning trading. The current status of the stock market is being closely monitored, with the Dow dropping in response to the unexpected inflation data while Nvidia slipped due to news concerning chip developments in China. Investors are staying updated on the live coverage of these events as they unfold.

data.title: Consumers distrust brands post-holidays due to data handling concerns. 95% shopped online in 2025, with 47% wary of data collection practices.
data.description: In the wake of the 2025 holiday season characterized by a surge in online shopping, flash sales, and tailored promotions, consumers are reassessing the trade-offs made for convenience. Results from a recent Clutch study of more than 400 American consumers reveal that 95% engaged in online shopping, underscoring the widespread adoption of digital retail. Despite this trend, there is lingering apprehension about brands' management of personal data, with 47% suspecting companies of gathering substantial amounts of information about them. This skepticism underscores a growing wariness among consumers regarding the extent to which their personal information is being accessed and utilized by businesses.

data.title: NY NOW announces 2026 Winter Market lineup at Jacob Javits Center, NY, Feb 1-3. Notable exhibitors include TY Inc, JK Adams, Chronicle Books.
data.description: In New York, NY NOW, a prominent wholesale trade show featuring gift, home, jewelry, and accessories, famous for its diverse marketplace bridging brands and buyers for over a century, announced the exhibitor roster for its 2026 Winter Market at the Jacob Javits Center in New York City from February 1-3, 2026. Renowned brands like TY Inc, JK Adams Company, Chronicle Books, and Liven Company are set to participate, alongside numerous other exhibitors. NY NOW remains a key platform for industry spotlight.

data.title: AAVE price expected to reach $190-195 by Feb 2026 with short-term target at $185-190 and critical support at $164.5.
data.description: Predictions for the price of AAVE suggest a short-term target of $185-190 within a week and a medium-term forecast ranging from $190-195 within a month. The bullish breakout is expected at $180.92, while critical support is identified at $164.5.

data.title: Corporate Insight recognizes CareFirst, Anthem BCBS, UPMC Health Plan, & Wellmark as digital experience leaders in healthcare, evaluating 24 insurers across 120+ attributes.
data.description: In its tenth year, the awards ceremony assessed 24 prominent health insurance companies on over 120 digital features encompassing both desktop and mobile user experiences. The evaluation was conducted in New York on January 13, 2026. Corporate Insight (CI), a top provider of competitive analysis and customer satisfaction studies, spearheaded the initiative.

data.title: US vehicle brand loyalty at 5-year high in 2025 - LexisNexisRisk Solutions. 3rd annual analysis shows  steady brand affinity despite rising prices and EV options.
data.description: A recent report, the Third annual U.S. Automotive Brand Loyalty Analysis, indicates that brand loyalty in the automotive industry has remained constant. This is notable as vehicle prices have been on the rise, more electric vehicle choices have become available, and fuel incentives have been changing. The report was released in Atlanta on Jan. 13, 2026, by LexisNexis® Risk Solutions, a prominent data and analytics provider. The study highlights that despite these challenges, consumers are still demonstrating strong loyalty to specific automotive brands.

data.title: WSB LLC acquires NEO Virtus Engineering, specializing in PV and energy storage design, enhancing WSB's power infrastructure services.
data.description: In Minneapolis, WSB LLC, a rapidly expanding infrastructure engineering and consulting company, revealed the purchase of NEO Virtus Engineering, an expert firm in photovoltaic (PV) and energy storage system design. This acquisition bolsters WSB's capacity to aid clients nationwide in the complete lifecycle of power/energy infrastructure. WSB is quickly becoming one of the top firms in this sector.

data.title: Celestia introduces Fibre Blockspace protocol aiming for 1Tb/s throughput across 500 nodes, surpassing its original target by 1,500x. Explore more.
data.description: Celestia introduces Fibre Blockspace, a cutting-edge data availability protocol aiming to achieve a transfer speed of 1 terabit per second distributed among 500 nodes. This goal marks a significant leap from its initial roadmap target, representing a substantial 1500-fold increase in performance. Learn more about this innovative development.

data.title: LDO price expected to reach $0.75-$0.85 by Feb 2026, signaling 21-37% increase from current $0.62. Bullish MACD.
data.description: The Lido DAO is displaying positive MACD signals pointing towards a potential price target of $0.75 to $0.85 by February 2026. This indicates a projected increase of 21-37% from its current price of $0.62.

data.title: Covenant Health in Knoxville, Tenn., earns Accreditation with Distinction from ANCC for Nurse Residency Program, boosting readiness and patient care.
data.description: In Knoxville, Tennessee on January 13, 2026, Covenant Health proudly announced that it has achieved Accreditation with Distinction from the American Nurses Credentialing Center (ANCC) for its Nurse Residency Program. This prestigious recognition highlights the institution's commitment to implementing evidence-based practices that enhance nurse preparedness, staff retention, and overall quality of patient care. This notable achievement underscores Covenant Health's dedication to upholding the highest standards in nursing education and training.

data.title: Solis Mammography acquires Women's Center for Radiology in Orlando, FL. Largest independent breast health provider.
data.description: Solis Mammography, the leading provider of specialized breast health services in the nation, has made a significant move by acquiring the Women's Center for Radiology in Orlando, FL. This acquisition marks their entrance into the Orlando market and strengthens their presence in the region. The Women's Center for Radiology, now part of Solis Mammography, brings with it a network of nine facilities that will enhance Solis' service offerings in the area. This strategic acquisition is part of Solis Mammography's expansion plan and solidifies their commitment to providing top-notch breast health services to more patients.

data.title: Record $15 billion spent on full-size pickup trucks in December as new-vehicle prices hit new high, average transaction price at all-time peak.
data.description: In December 2025, the average transaction price (ATP) for a new vehicle reached a record high, as reported by Kelley Blue Book, a Cox Automotive brand. This increase was driven by a notable selection of midsize SUVs and full-size pickup trucks.

data.title: Government offers 10% additional issuance of RIKB 38 0215 and RIKS 29 0917, at bids' prices.
data.description: During the Treasury bond auction on January 9th, the Government Debt Management offered a quantity equal to 10% of the nominal value for sale. This was done at the price of the winning bids as stipulated in the General Terms of Auction for Treasury bonds.
